title: "Sol System" Pack
body:
## 🌌 About the pack as a whole 
 The main task of the pack is to optimize the game per the minimum number of mods. Decorative mods are selected in such a way as to practically not change the vanilla look of the game, only slightly complementing it.
## 🧷 On the absence of some popular mods
- The zoom mods have been replaced by a mod for easy use of the spyglass. After the introduction of the spyglass these mods [for zoom] “kill” the aforementioned item. Why not give credit to the developers and not use it [spyglass], especially since it is much more convenient to do so with mods?
- The functionality of the **[Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)** already exists in the game, though not as convenient and visual. Nevertheless, I don't see the point of including it in the pack, the feature of which is minimalism
 
- **[Apple Skin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)**, though beautiful, is useless for experienced players or in endgame
- **[Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice)** / **[Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)** is not used on all servers, so it was not added to the pack
- **[Lirematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica)** was not added to the pack because not all builders need it. Axiom, on the other hand, offers functionality without which it is simply tedious to build something in creative
## 🪐Afterword

EMF and ETF have been added to the pack for the operability of some resourcepacks (mainly for **[Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)**)

Inspirer: **[HyperSoop](https://modrinth.com/user/HyperSoop)** (**[SO](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)**)
